# Innovation Campus

> Premium coworking spaces, meeting rooms, and event venues in Málaga (Spain), Ancona, and Olbia (Italy).

Innovation Campus provides flexible workspaces for professionals, startups, and companies. Our locations offer coworking desks, private offices, state-of-the-art meeting rooms, and event spaces for up to 80 people.

## Locations

- **Málaga Palace** — Historic Center, Málaga, Spain. Full-service coworking with multiple conference rooms and a rooftop terrace.
- **Málaga Terrace** — Seaside, Málaga, Spain. Coworking space with sea views and terrace.
- **Ancona** — Ancona, Italy. Coworking and meeting rooms.
- **Olbia** — Olbia, Sardinia, Italy. Coworking and event spaces.

## Services

### Coworking
Flexible hot desks and dedicated desks. Daily, weekly, and monthly memberships available.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/coworking-space
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/coworking
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/coworking

### Meeting Rooms
Five conference rooms at Málaga Palace, all equipped with 4K displays and video conferencing.
- **Big Conference Room** — Up to 80 people, 85" 4K display, premium A/V
- **Large Conference Room** — Up to 50 people, 55" 4K display, boardroom setup
- **Quarter Conference Room** — Up to 30 people, 43" display, intimate setting
- **Training Room** — Up to 40 people, 4K projector, classroom layout
- **Phone Booth** — 1–2 people, soundproofed, video call ready

Meeting rooms overview:
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/salas-de-reuniones
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/sale-riunioni

Individual room pages:
- https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms/big-conference-room
- https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms/large-conference-room
- https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms/quarter-conference-room
- https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms/training-room
- https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms/phone-booth

### Private Offices
Dedicated private office suites for teams.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/private-offices
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/oficinas-privadas
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/uffici-privati

### Events & Venue Hire
Host corporate events, workshops, conferences, and team retreats. Capacity up to 80 people.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/host-your-event
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/organiza-tu-evento
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/organizza-evento

### Private Terrace
Exclusive rooftop terrace for events and meetings.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/private-terrace

### Business Registration
Register your company address at Innovation Campus.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/business-registration

### Academy
Training programs and workshops.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/academy
